summary: Iteration 206 testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All key Orbital Hub features verified after major refactoring. Hub shows 6 active satellites with 7 dormant. Long-press opens Abyss with Fibonacci spiral dormant satellites. Click on dormant activates it. Right-click on active deactivates it. Double-tap triggers Zen Reset. ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE opens on short click. Weather Ribbon displays when authenticated (Freezing Fog 30.2°F 100% humidity, fair seeing).
critical_code_review_comments: OrbitalHub.js: Lean orchestrator (~180 lines) with clean state management - PASS
CentralOrb.js: Abyss expands to 70% viewport (viewMin * 0.35 radius) - PASS
AbyssSatellite.js: Supports both click and drag-to-extract with haptic vibration - PASS
ActiveSatellite.js: Dimmed prop reduces opacity to 0.2 when Abyss open - PASS
WeatherRibbon.js: Displays weather data with glassmorphic styling - PASS
constants.js: ALL_SATELLITES (13 items), ZONE_AUDIO, WEATHER_AUDIO_MAP, WEATHER_EFFECTS - PASS
GET /api/hub/preferences: Returns active_satellites list with defaults - PASS
POST /api/hub/preferences: Updates and persists active_satellites - PASS
GET /api/weather/current: Returns weather with temperature_f, humidity, seeing_quality, category - PASS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 206 Orbital Hub refactoring fully working. (1) Backend: GET /api/hub/preferences returns active_satellites list (defaults: mood, mixer, map, breathing, meditation, theory). POST /api/hub/preferences updates list. GET /api/weather/current returns weather with temperature_f, humidity, seeing_quality, category, frequency. (2) Frontend: /hub shows 6 active satellites orbiting central orb. Central orb shows 'ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE' label and '7 dormant' count. Long-press (>500ms) opens Abyss showing dormant satellites in Fibonacci spiral. Click on dormant satellite activates it. Right-click on active satellite deactivates it. Double-tap (two clicks within 300ms) triggers Zen Reset (all satellites dormant). Short click opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE overlay with Profile, Dashboard, Settings, Mastery Tiers, Analytics, Admin. WeatherRibbon (data-testid='weather-ribbon') shows temp, description, humidity, seeing quality at top when authenticated. Active satellites dim (opacity 0.2) when Abyss is open. Bottom hint text visible. (3) Key data-testids: orbital-hub-page, central-orb, weather-ribbon, satellite-{id}, dormant-{id}, abyss-backdrop.
